body.title: [sprint] Demo daemon — test Ground Loop supervisor end-to-end
body.intention: I intend that the Ground Loop supervisor pattern is proven to work via a concrete, testable demo.
body.description:
Create a simple demo daemon at `devices/demo_daemon/groundloop/runme.py` that: (1) Writes a heartbeat to a log file every 5s; (2) has a start() and stop() entrypoint; (3) includes a config.yaml with `launch_frequency: 5s`. Use this to verify Ground Loop supervisor works: spawn Ground Loop, confirm demo daemon runs and logs heartbeats, modify runme.py and hot-reload, inject error and verify .borkedpy rename, fix and verify recovery. This is the smoke test for the whole daemon supervisor pattern.

**Affected files:** devices/demo_daemon/groundloop/runme.py (new), devices/demo_daemon/groundloop/config.yaml (new)
**Design rules:** none apply (demo only)
**Scope boundary:** Demo/test only; not part of production daemon fleet
**Completion criteria:** (1) Demo daemon runs under Ground Loop; (2) heartbeat log file grows; (3) hot-reload works; (4) error handling works; (5) all Ground Loop logs show expected state transitions
**Test plan:** Follow the end-to-end flow above; verify Ground Loop supervisor handles demo daemon correctly
